Copied from [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:lua:bitmap here].

====== Class Bitmap ======
<pre>
===== See also: =====
</pre>

[[Lua global#gfx_draw_box|gfx_draw_box]]

===== draw_box =====
<pre>
 draw_box(bitmap, x1, y1, x2, y2, color)
</pre>

Draws a filled box with the corners (x1, y1) and (x2, y2)
with the color //color// using the currently selected blender.

===== h =====
<pre>
 h()
</pre>

Returns the width of this bitmap.

===== hline =====
(available from version 0.9c)

<pre>
 hline(x1, y1, x2, color)
</pre>

Draws a horizontal [[Lua bitmap#line|line]] from (x1, y1) to (x2, y1)
with the color //color// using the currently selected blender.

===== line =====
(available from version 0.9c)

<pre>
 line(x1, y1, x2, y2, color)
</pre>

Draws a [[Lua bitmap#line|line]] from (x1, y1) to (x2, y2)
with the color //color// using the currently selected blender.

===== linewu =====
(available from version 0.9c)

<pre>
 linewu(x1, y1, x2, y2, color)
</pre>

Draws a Wu-line from (x1, y1) to (x2, y2)
with the color //colour// using the currently selected blender.

===== putpixel =====
(available from version 0.9c)

<pre>
 putpixel(x1, y1, color)
</pre>

Draws a pixel at position (x1, y1)
with the color //color// using the currently selected blender.

===== putpixelwu =====
(available from version 0.9c)

<pre>
 putpixelwu(x1, y1, color)
</pre>

Draws a Wu-pixel at position (x1, y1)
with the color //color// using the currently selected blender.

===== w =====
<pre>
 w()
</pre>

Returns the width of this bitmap.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20121214065623/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Lua:bitmap -->
